sp_widget.name: scm-table
sp_widget.option_schema: [ { "hint": "Table name", "name": "table", "section": "Data", "label": "Table", "type": "string" }, { "hint": "Default fields", "name": "default_fields", "section": "Data", "label": "Default fields", "type": "string" }, { "hint": "Default sorting field", "name": "order_by", "section": "Behavior", "label": "Order by", "type": "string" }, { "hint": "Default sorting direction", "name": "order_direction", "section": "Behavior", "label": "Order direction", "type": "choice", "choices": [ { "label": "ASC", "value": "ASC" }, { "label": "DESC", "value": "DESC" } ] }, { "hint": "Page header", "name": "page_title", "section": "Presentation", "label": "Page title", "type": "string" }, { "hint": "Default number of records per page", "name": "limit", "section": "Behavior", "label": "Limit", "type": "integer" }, { "hint": "Name of the preference containing the list of fields", "name": "fields_preference_name", "section": "Behavior", "label": "Fields preference name", "type": "string" }, { "hint": "Name of the preference containing the order by", "name": "order_by_preference_name", "section": "Behavior", "label": "Order by preference name", "type": "string" }, { "hint": "Name of the preference containing the order direction", "name": "order_direction_preference_name", "section": "Behavior", "label": "Order direction preference name", "type": "string" }, { "hint": "Name of the preference containing the limit", "name": "limit_preference_name", "section": "Behavior", "label": "Limit preference name", "type": "string" }, { "hint": "All the fields available by the user to be shown in the table", "name": "all_fields_available", "section": "Data", "label": "All fields available", "type": "string" }, { "hint": "ID of the detail view page of the records", "name": "detail_view_page", "section": "Behavior", "label": "Detail view page", "type": "string" }, { "hint": "Enable filters for the table", "section": "Behavior", "name": "enable_filters", "label": "Enable Filters", "type": "boolean" }, { "hint": "Configuration for the filter fields", "section": "Behavior", "name": "filter_fields", "label": "Filter Fields Configuration", "type": "string" } ]

sys_update_version.name: sp_widget_c736f3a383aa2650efda54b6feaad3f2
sys_update_version.payload: custom {}); }; c.goToFirstPage = function () { c.page = 1; getTableData(); }; c.goToPreviousPage = function () { if (c.page > 1) { c.page -= 1; getTableData(); } }; c.goToNextPage = function () { if (c.page < c.totalPages) { c.page += 1; getTableData(); } }; c.goToLastPage = function () { c.page = c.totalPages; getTableData(); }; c.sort = function (fieldName) { c.page = 1; let savePromise; if (c.data.orderBy === fieldName) { const orderDirection = c.data.orderDirection === "ASC" ? "DESC" : "ASC"; savePromise = c.data.canSavePreferences ? savePreference("orderDirection", orderDirection) : Promise.resolve(); } else { savePromise = c.data.canSavePreferences ? savePreference("orderBy", fieldName).then(() => { savePreference("orderDirection", "ASC"); }) : Promise.resolve(); } savePromise.then(() => { getTableData(); }); }; c.addField = function () { c.selectedFieldsList.push(c.fieldToAdd); const index = c.unselectedFieldsList.findIndex( (field) => field.name === c.fieldToAdd.name, ); c.unselectedFieldsList.splice(index, 1); c.fieldToAdd = null; }; c.removeField = function () { c.unselectedFieldsList.push(c.fieldToRemove); const index = c.selectedFieldsList.findIndex( (field) => field.name === c.fieldToRemove.name, ); c.selectedFieldsList.splice(index, 1); c.fieldToRemove = null; }; c.moveFieldUp = function () { const index = c.selectedFieldsList.findIndex( (field) => field.name === c.fieldToRemove.name, ); if (index > 0) { const temp = c.selectedFieldsList[index - 1]; c.selectedFieldsList[index - 1] = c.selectedFieldsList[index]; c.selectedFieldsList[index] = temp; } }; c.moveFieldDown = function () { const index = c.selectedFieldsList.findIndex( (field) => field.name === c.fieldToRemove.name, ); if (index < c.selectedFieldsList.length - 1) { const temp = c.selectedFieldsList[index + 1]; c.selectedFieldsList[index + 1] = c.selectedFieldsList[index]; c.selectedFieldsList[index] = temp; } }; c.saveListView = function () { c.savingListView = true; const savePromise = c.data.canSavePreferences ? savePreference("columns", JSON.stringify(c.selectedFieldsList)) : Promise.resolve(); savePromise.then(() => { getTableColumns().then(() => { c.savingListView = false; document.getElementById(c.settingsDialogId).close(); }); getTableData(); }); }; c.cancelListView = function () { c.cancelingListView = true; c.selectedFieldsList = angular.copy(c.data.columns); c.unselectedFieldsList = angular.copy(c.data.allColumnsAvailable); c.unselectedFieldsList = c.unselectedFieldsList.filter((field) => { return !c.selectedFieldsList.some( (selectedField) => selectedField.name === field.name, ); }); c.fieldToAdd = null; c.fieldToRemove = null; c.cancelingListView = false; document.getElementById(c.settingsDialogId).close(); }; c.revertListViewToDefault = function () { c.revertingListView = true; c.server .get({ action: "revertListViewToDefault", transactionId: c.data.transactionId, configurationRecordSysId: c.data.configurationRecordSysId, }) .then((response) => { c.data.columns = response.data.columns; c.revertingListView = false; document.getElementById(c.settingsDialogId).close(); getTableData(); }); }; c.getFirstRecordIndex = function () { return (c.page - 1) * parseInt(c.data.limit, 10) + 1; }; c.getLastRecordIndex = function () { const last = c.page * parseInt(c.data.limit, 10); return last > c.totalRecords ? c.totalRecords : last; }; c.applyFilters = function () { c.appliedFilters = c.filters .filter((filter) => { return filter.value && filter.value !== ""; }) .map((filter) => { return { field: filter.field, label: filter.label, type: filter.type, value: filter.value, choiceValues: filter.choiceValues, referenceTable: filter.referenceTable, displayFields: filter.displayFields, referenceQualifier: filter.referenceQualifier, id: filter.id, }; }); c.page = 1; getTotalRecords(); getTableData(); getAppliedFiltersInfoMessage(); document.getElementById(c.filtersDialogId).close(); }; c.cancelFilters = function () { c.filters.forEach((filter) => { const appliedFilter = c.appliedFilters.find( (af) => af.field === filter.field, ); filter.value = appliedFilter ? appliedFilter.value : ""; }); document.getElementById(c.filtersDialogId).close(); }; function getBreadcrumbs() { return c.server .get({ action: "getBreadcrumbs", transactionId: c.data.transactionId, configurationRecordSysId: c.data.configurationRecordSysId, }) .then((response) => { const breadcrumbs = response.data.breadcrumbs || []; scmBreadcrumbsManager.set(breadcrumbs); }); } function getTableColumns() { return c.server .get({ action: "getTableColumns", transactionId: c.data.transactionId, configurationRecordSysId: c.data.configurationRecordSysId, }) .then((response) => { c.data.columns = response.data.columns; }); } function getTableData() { c.showSpinner = true; c.server .get({ action: "getTableData", transactionId: c.data.transactionId, configurationRecordSysId: c.data.configurationRecordSysId, page: c.page, filters: c.appliedFilters || [], }) .then((response) => { c.records = response.data.records; c.data.orderBy = response.data.orderBy; c.data.orderDirection = response.data.orderDirection; c.showSpinner = false; }); } function getTotalRecords() { c.server .get({ action: "getTotalRecords", transactionId: c.data.transactionId, configurationRecordSysId: c.data.configurationRecordSysId, filters: c.appliedFilters || [], }) .then((response) => { c.totalRecords = response.data.totalRecords; c.totalPages = Math.ceil(c.totalRecords / c.data.limit); }); } function initializeFilters() { c.filters = []; if (c.data.filterFields.length > 0) { c.data.filterFields.forEach((fieldConfig) => { const filter = { field: fieldConfig.field, label: fieldConfig.label, type: fieldConfig.type, value: "", choiceValues: [], loading: false, id: spUtil.createUid("xxxx-xxxx"), }; if (fieldConfig.type === "reference") { filter.referenceTable = fieldConfig.referenceTable; filter.displayField = fieldConfig.displayField; filter.searchFields = fieldConfig.searchFields; filter.placeholder = fieldConfig.placeholder || "Search " + fieldConfig.label; filter.referenceQualifier = fieldConfig.referenceQualifier; filter.pageSize = fieldConfig.pageSize; filter.minimumInputLength = fieldConfig.minimumInputLength || 3; filter.displayFields = fieldConfig.displayFields; filter.orderBy = fieldConfig.orderBy; filter.orderDirection = fieldConfig.orderDirection; } if (filter.type === "choice") { loadChoiceValues(filter); } c.filters.push(filter); }); } } function loadChoiceValues(filter) { filter.loading = true; c.server .get({ action: "getChoiceValues", transactionId: c.data.transactionId, configurationRecordSysId: c.data.configurationRecordSysId, fieldName: filter.field, }) .then((response) => { filter.choiceValues = response.data.choiceValues || []; filter.loading = false; }) .catch(() => { filter.loading = false; }); } function savePreference(preferenceName, preferenceValue) { if (!c.data.canSavePreferences) return Promise.resolve(); return c.server.get({ action: "savePreference", transactionId: c.data.transactionId, configurationRecordSysId: c.data.configurationRecordSysId, preferenceName: preferenceName, preferenceValue: preferenceValue, }); } function getAppliedFiltersInfoMessage() { c.appliedFiltersHtml = $sce.trustAsHtml(""); c.server .get({ action: "getAppliedFiltersInfoMessage", transactionId: c.data.transactionId, configurationRecordSysId: c.data.configurationRecordSysId, appliedFilters: c.appliedFilters || [], }) .then((response) => { c.appliedFiltersHtml = $sce.trustAsHtml( response.data.appliedFiltersHtml, ); }); } function init() { c.totalRecords = 0; c.totalPages = 0; c.page = 1; c.records = []; c.fieldToAdd = null; c.fieldToRemove = null; c.settingsDialogId = spUtil.createUid("xxxx-xxxx"); c.filtersDialogId = spUtil.createUid("xxxx-xxxx"); c.limitSelectId = spUtil.createUid("xxxx-xxxx"); getTotalRecords(); getTableData(); getBreadcrumbs(); c.selectedFieldsList = angular.copy(c.data.columns); c.unselectedFieldsList = angular.copy(c.data.allColumnsAvailable); c.unselectedFieldsList = c.unselectedFieldsList.filter((field) => { return !c.selectedFieldsList.some( (selectedField) => selectedField.name === field.name, ); }); if (c.data.canFilter) { c.filters = []; c.appliedFilters = []; c.appliedFiltersHtml = $sce.trustAsHtml(""); initializeFilters(); } c.showTableHeader = c.data.columns.filter((field) => field.label).length > 0; } }; ]]>c#table-header { display: flex; flex-direction: row; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } #table-wrapper { width: 100%; overflow-x: auto; table { width: 100%; min-width: max-content; border-collapse: separate; border-spacing: 0 var(--scm-spacing-2); table-layout: fixed; thead { tr { background-color: var(--scm-color-horizon); height: var(--scm-spacing-5); border-radius: var(--scm-border-radius-small); th { margin: 0; text-align: left; vertical-align: middle; font-weight: var(--scm-font-weight-semibold); font-size: var(--scm-icon-size-xsmall); color: var(--scm-color-gray); background-color: var(--scm-color-horizon); height: var(--scm-spacing-5); width: 200px; min-width: 200px; padding-left: var(--scm-padding-2); padding-right: var(--scm-padding-2); white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; &:first-child { border-top-left-radius: var(--scm-border-radius-small); border-bottom-left-radius: var( --scm-border-radius-small ); } &:last-child { border-top-right-radius: var(--scm-border-radius-small); border-bottom-right-radius: var( --scm-border-radius-small ); } } } } tbody { tr { &:hover { td { background-color: var(--scm-color-blue-tint-3); &:hover { background-color: var(--scm-color-blue-tint-2); } } } td { margin: 0; text-align: left; vertical-align: middle; font-weight: var(--scm-font-weight-regular); font-size: var(--scm-icon-size-xsmall); background-color: var(--scm-color-sc-white); height: var(--scm-spacing-5); width: 200px; min-width: 200px; padding-left: var(--scm-padding-2); padding-right: var(--scm-padding-2); white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; &:first-child { border-top-left-radius: var(--scm-border-radius-medium); border-bottom-left-radius: var( --scm-border-radius-medium ); } &:last-child { border-top-right-radius: var( --scm-border-radius-medium ); border-bottom-right-radius: var( --scm-border-radius-medium ); } } } } } } #controller-wrapper { display: flex; flex-direction: row; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding-left: var(--scm-padding-2); padding-right: var(--scm-padding-2); div { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--scm-spacing-2); } #metadata-wrapper { display: flex; flex-direction: row; align-items: center; div { color: var(--scm-color-gray); font-weight: var(--scm-font-weight-light); font-size: var(--scm-font-size-xsmall); margin-right: var(--scm-spacing-4); } } sdx-dialog sdx-dialog-toggle sdx-icon { color: var(--scm-color-int-blue); cursor: pointer; } sdx-dialog sdx-dialog-toggle sdx-icon:hover { color: var(--scm-color-int-blue-active); } } #filters-wrapper { margin-top: var(--scm-spacing-6); margin-bottom: var(--scm-spacing-6); #filters-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: var(--scm-spacing-3); gap: var(--scm-spacing-4); } #filters-form { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr)); gap: var(--scm-spacing-3); } } #applied-filters-wrapper { margin-top: var(--scm-spacing-3); margin-bottom: var(--scm-spacing-3); #applied-filters-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: var(--scm-spacing-1); font-weight: var(--scm-font-weight-semibold); font-size: var(--scm-icon-size-xsmall); color: var(--scm-color-gray); } #applied-filters-list { color: var(--scm-color-gray); font-weight: var(--scm-font-weight-light); font-size: var(--scm-font-size-xsmall); .filter-separator { margin: 0 var(--scm-spacing-2); font-weight: var(--scm-font-weight-semibold); color: var(--scm-color-int-blue); } } } sp_instancefalsescm-tablefalsescm-table[ { "hint": "Table name", "name": "table", "section": "Data", "label": "Table", "type": "string" }, { "hint": "Default fields", "name": "default_fields", "section": "Data", "label": "Default fields", "type": "string" }, { "hint": "Default sorting field", "name": "order_by", "section": "Behavior", "label": "Order by", "type": "string" }, { "hint": "Default sorting direction", "name": "order_direction", "section": "Behavior", "label": "Order direction", "type": "choice", "choices": [ { "label": "ASC", "value": "ASC" }, { "label": "DESC", "value": "DESC" } ] }, { "hint": "Page header", "name": "page_title", "section": "Presentation", "label": "Page title", "type": "string" }, { "hint": "Default number of records per page", "name": "limit", "section": "Behavior", "label": "Limit", "type": "integer" }, { "hint": "Name of the preference containing the list of fields", "name": "fields_preference_name", "section": "Behavior", "label": "Fields preference name", "type": "string" }, { "hint": "Name of the preference containing the order by", "name": "order_by_preference_name", "section": "Behavior", "label": "Order by preference name", "type": "string" }, { "hint": "Name of the preference containing the order direction", "name": "order_direction_preference_name", "section": "Behavior", "label": "Order direction preference name", "type": "string" }, { "hint": "Name of the preference containing the limit", "name": "limit_preference_name", "section": "Behavior", "label": "Limit preference name", "type": "string" }, { "hint": "All the fields available by the user to be shown in the table", "name": "all_fields_available", "section": "Data", "label": "All fields available", "type": "string" }, { "hint": "ID of the detail view page of the records", "name": "detail_view_page", "section": "Behavior", "label": "Detail view page", "type": "string" }, { "hint": "Enable filters for the table", "section": "Behavior", "name": "enable_filters", "label": "Enable Filters", "type": "boolean" }, { "hint": "Configuration for the filter fields", "section": "Behavior", "name": "filter_fields", "label": "Filter Fields Configuration", "type": "string" } ] falsefalsesp_widgetadmin2025-07-11 18:21:31c736f3a383aa2650efda54b6feaad3f2148scm-table9b70ffe7836a2650efda54b6feaad3349b70ffe7836a2650efda54b6feaad334sp_widget_c736f3a383aa2650efda54b6feaad3f2admin2026-06-20 22:08:42
